samples.idea: AI-powered intake and triage assistant for SMB legal practices
samples.context: Target: solo and 2-10 attorney firms drowning in incoming inquiries. Replaces manual intake forms and paralegal triage.
Target: urban commuters in EU + US cities who want car-replacement transport but can't afford a new e-bike. Includes maintenance, swap-out, and theft protection.

samples.idea: Workflow automation tool for indie podcasters
samples.context: Target: solo podcasters with 50-5000 weekly listeners managing edits, show notes, distribution, and sponsor invoicing manually. Sweet spot: 1-3 episodes per week.

agents.task_template: Generate 3 original, differentiated business ideas adjacent to: "{idea}". Use the structured brief format. Context: {context}
Perform a full viability analysis on this business idea: "{idea}". Context: {context}
Build a financial model for the business idea: "{idea}". Context: {context}
Analyze the competitive landscape for: "{idea}". Identify direct/indirect competitors, gaps, and differentiation. Context: {context}
Create a go-to-market strategy with beachhead segment, channel plan, and launch roadmap for: "{idea}". Context: {context}
Produce a deep competitive intelligence analysis with funding trajectories, moat assessment, white-space map, and positioning grid for: "{idea}". Context: {context}
